component.name: DeckPlayer
component.summary: Controller-friendly local media player for Steam Deck and Linux handhelds

description.p: DeckPlayer is a local-first media browser and player built for Steam Deck Game Mode and KDE desktop use.
It starts in the Videos folder, keeps browser controls large and simple, and supports direct gamepad controls for browsing, playback, seeking, subtitle selection, and audio track selection.
Adds GitHub Actions CI, CLAUDE.md codebase documentation, and updated release metadata.
Adds volume control, per-file playback resume, and an exit confirmation hold gesture to prevent accidental closes.
First stable release with Flatpak packaging, controller-friendly browsing, direct Steam Deck gamepad support, local video playback, subtitles/audio track cycling, and fading playback overlays.
